Name: JigglerBehaviorParam
Description: Determines the rotational behavior of a jiggle bone.

Fields.Name: Minimum Acceleration for Rotation
Fields.Description: The minimum acceleration to start the rotation of the bone. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Acceleration for Maximum Rotation
Fields.Description: The acceleration at which the rotational force reaches it maximum value. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Minimum Velocity for Rotation
Fields.Description: The minimum velocity to start the rotation of the bone. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Velocity for Maximum Rotation
Fields.Description: The velocity at which the rotational force reaches it maximum value. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Rotational Acceleration: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient for rotating the X-axis velocity and acceleration.

Fields.Name: Rotational Acceleration: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient for rotating the Y-axis velocity and acceleration.

Fields.Name: Rotational Decay: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient that dampens the angular velocity on the X-axis.

Fields.Name: Rotational Decay: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The coefficient that dampens the angular velocity on the Y-axis.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Minimum Angle: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the X-axis rotation reaches it's minimum angle.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Maximum Angle: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the X-axis rotation reaches it's maximum angle.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Minimum Angle: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the Y-axis rotation reaches it's minimum angle.

Fields.Name: Reflection Rate at Maximum Angle: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The reflection rate when the Y-axis rotation reaches it's maximum angle.
